studyName: Nivolumab and Tumor Infiltrating Lymphocytes (TIL) in Advanced Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Type of sequencing for this sample

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected; LN=lymph_node

variables.name: COLLECTION_AGE
variables.description: Age sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: PATIENT_ID
variables.description: Patient ID

variables.name: PRIMARY_METASTATIC_TUMOR
variables.description: Primary tumor, metastasis, or transformed cell line

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_TYPE
variables.description: Type of sample

variables.name: TUMOR_STAGE
variables.description: Tumor stage of sample by AJCC version 7

variables.name: TUMOR_TREATMENT
variables.description: Indicates the historical record of therapy received by a lung cancer patient prior to tumor resection

tables.description: This subject phenotypes data table contains subject IDs, case control status of the subject for metastatic non-small cell lung cancer (All subjects are lung cancer patients), race, age, smoking pack years, oncogenes, PDL1 status, tumor site, tumor infiltrating lymphocytes (TIL) infusion, and prior therapy.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject for metastatic non-small cell lung cancer

variables.name: AGE
variables.description: Subject age at enrollment

variables.name: ONCOGENE
variables.description: Driver oncogene inferred from baseline clinical NGS sequencing of tumor DNA

variables.name: PDL1_Status
variables.description: Baseline percentage PD-L1 tumor proportion score (TPS) immunohistochemistry as assessed by clinical pathologist using 22C3 antibody methodology

variables.name: Prior_therapy
variables.description: Indicates the historical record of therapy received by a lung cancer patient prior to tumor resection

variables.name: RACE
variables.description: Self-reported race

variables.name: SMOKING_PACKYEARS
variables.description: A pack year is defined as twenty cigarettes smoked everyday for one year, over a subject's lifetime.

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: TIL_Infusion
variables.description: Indicates whether patient ultimately received the TIL infusion product or not

variables.name: Tumor_Site
variables.description: Location of metastasis resected (harvested) for genomics and TIL (tumor-infiltrating lymphocytes)

tables.description: This subject consent data table contains subject IDs, consent information, and sex.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Biological sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID for sequencing

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
